text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm taking a stroll through a park on my day off,
when...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: HI-YAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I come across Yaeno Muteki practicing martial
arts.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You're from the academy... Yes, this training is
my daily routine.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
However, my skills still pale in comparison to
either of my masters...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I thought I could apply the ancient martial arts
I've studied to racing as well... I believed that if I
ran fast, I could also punch faster...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I entered the academy for this reason, but doing
so only opened my eyes to just how far I have yet
to go.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
My grandparents. They're masters of the Kongo
Yaegaki style.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
What can I possibly do to come closer to reaching
their level?
choice_data_list:
You should focus on how quickly you can
punch.

You should focus on how powerfully you can
punch.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...I see. I shall concentrate my efforts on
increasing the speed of my strikes, then.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I will try it at once... HAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hm. Concentrating on the speed of my punches
has made me realize I need to improve my form.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I feel as though I am once again a novice, seeing
things for the first time! I shall continue this
exercise for a little longer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki stoically continues practicing her
punches.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...I see. I shall concentrate my efforts on
increasing the strength of my strikes, then.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I will try it at once... HAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wham!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hm. Concentrating on the force of my punches
has made me realize how much energy each strike
consumes.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
However, that is exactly the point of training. I
feel all the more motivated to continue now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki stoically continues practicing her
punches.
